LightningComponentBundle.description: Customer summary card with photo, location, action buttons, contact info, and Engagement Signals (CSAT, LTV, Sentiment). Configure field API names and colors in Edit Page.

property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Title
property.description: Card title (optional; shown in header area).

property.name: showCallButton
property.label: Show Call Button
property.description: Show or hide the Call action button.

property.name: showMessageButton
property.label: Show Message Button
property.description: Deprecated: Message button has been removed from the component. This property is kept for page compatibility only.

property.name: showEmailButton
property.label: Show Email Button
property.description: Show or hide the Email action button.

property.name: nameField
property.label: Name Field
property.description: API name for name (e.g. Contact.Name, Account.Name).

property.name: titleField
property.label: Title Field
property.description: API name for title. Shown as 'Title at Account Name' below the name (e.g. CEO at Omega).

property.name: locationField
property.label: Location Field
property.description: API name for location (e.g. Contact.MailingCity). Leave blank if not used.

property.name: emailField
property.label: Email Field
property.description: API name for email (e.g. Contact.Email).

property.name: phoneField
property.label: Phone Field
property.description: API name for phone (e.g. Contact.Phone).

property.name: addressField
property.label: Address Field
property.description: API name for address (e.g. Contact.MailingStreet). Leave blank if not used.

property.name: accountIdField
property.label: Account Id Field
property.description: API name for Account lookup (e.g. Contact.AccountId). Used for Account link.

property.name: accountNameField
property.label: Account Name Field
property.description: API name for Account name (e.g. Contact.Account.Name). Shown in Account row.

property.name: photoField
property.label: Photo Field
property.description: API name for profile photo URL. Leave blank for placeholder.

property.name: csatField
property.label: CSAT Field
property.description: API name for CSAT score 0-100. Leave blank if not used.

property.name: ltvField
property.label: LTV Field
property.description: API name for LTV currency. Leave blank if not used.

property.name: sentimentField
property.label: Sentiment Field
property.description: API name for sentiment (Positive, Neutral, Negative). Leave blank if not used.

property.name: relatedLookupField
property.label: Related Lookup Field
property.description: On Case (or parent) pages: full API name of the lookup to the customer record (e.g. Case.ContactId or Case.AccountId). Leave blank when the page record is the customer (Contact/Account).

property.name: allowEditEngagement
property.label: Allow Editing Engagement Values
property.description: When true, users can edit LTV, CSAT, and Sentiment inline to override or fake values.

property.name: showDebugInfo
property.label: Show Debug Info (Troubleshooting)
property.description: When true, shows a panel with record Ids, requested fields, and values read. Use to debug why contact info does not load.

property.name: headerBackgroundColor
property.label: Header Background Color
property.description: Header gradient start color (e.g. #1b3a5c).

property.name: headerGradientColor
property.label: Header Gradient Color
property.description: Header gradient end color (e.g. #2d5a87).

property.name: badgePositiveColor
property.label: Badge Positive Color
property.description: Badge background for positive/High (e.g. #4caf50).

property.name: badgeNeutralColor
property.label: Badge Neutral Color
property.description: Badge background for neutral (e.g. #9e9e9e).

property.name: badgeNegativeColor
property.label: Badge Negative Color
property.description: Badge background for negative/Low (e.g. #f44336).
